Identity.Name: StingSignoffRoles
Identity.Definition: Sign-off / approval roles used across STING workflows, deliverables, and healthcare-pack validators. Each role carries a Planscape user attribute and drives the "must be signed by" requirement in IDS specs. QE_Radiation in particular gates the radiation-shielding calculators.

Governance.StandardsBasis: IFC4 IfcActorRole enum (extended for healthcare); ISO 19650 appointed-party roles; UK CDM 2015 roles

Value.Definition: Designer — originator of design content; first signature in any sign-off chain.
Reviewer — peer / line-manager technical review before formal approval.
Approver — discipline lead with authority to issue.
Qualified Expert (Radiation) — IPEM-registered medical physicist or equivalent. Required signoff before RAD_* calculators are treated as authoritative.
Commissioning Engineer — signs off MGS verification, pressure regime, water flush, EES tests.
Engineer — discipline engineer (structural / MEP / fire / acoustic).
Project Manager — commercial / programme sign-off authority.
BIM Coordinator — Information Manager / BIM lead per ISO 19650.
Client Approver — appointing party with authority to authorise published deliverables (A1..A5 transitions).
